problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy
hypothesis: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy may resolve What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
